exercises.name: Barbell Squat
exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body by bending knees and hips until thighs are parallel to the floor.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width apart, barbell over mid-foot. Hinge at hips, drive through heels to stand tall.

exercises.name: Lunges
exercises.description: Step forward with one leg and lower your hips until both knees are bent at about a 90-degree angle.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.description: Sit on the machine and push the platform away from you using your legs.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.description: Stand on the edge of a step and lift your heels as high as possible.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.description: Squat, kick feet back, push-up, jump feet to hands, and jump up.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.description: High plank position, drive knees toward chest rapidly.

exercises.name: Clean and Press
exercises.description: Lift barbell from floor to shoulders (clean) then press overhead.

exercises.name: Thrusters
exercises.description: A front squat followed immediately by an overhead press in one motion.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swings
exercises.description: Swing a kettlebell from between legs up to shoulder height using hip drive.

exercises.name: Plank Hold
exercises.description: Forearm plank position, maintain straight line from head to heels.

exercises.name: Russian Twists
exercises.description: Sit, lean back, rotate torso to touch floor on each side.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.description: Lie on back, lift legs and shoulders off floor, pressing lower back down.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.description: On all fours, extend opposite arm and leg simultaneously.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.description: Lie on back, arms up, legs in tabletop. Lower opposite arm and leg.

exercises.name: Box Jumps
exercises.description: Jump onto a sturdy box, land softly, step down.

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
exercises.description: Jump feet out while clapping hands overhead, then return.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.description: Run in place while driving knees up towards the chest.

exercises.name: Battle Ropes
exercises.description: Create waves in heavy ropes using your arms while maintaining a squat.

exercises.name: Shadow Boxing
exercises.description: Perform boxing combinations in the air with fast footwork.

exercises.name: Concentration Curls
exercises.description: Curling a dumbbell while sitting and bracing the arm against the leg.

exercises.name: Preacher Curls
exercises.description: Curls performed on a slanted bench to isolate the bicep.

exercises.name: Cable Curls
exercises.description: Curls using a cable machine for constant tension.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curls
exercises.description: Curls while sitting on an incline bench to stretch the bicep.

exercises.name: Spider Curls
exercises.description: Curls while lying face down on an incline bench.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.description: Standard barbell chest press.

exercises.name: Incline Press
exercises.description: Pressing dumbbells or barbell on an incline bench.

exercises.name: Chest Flyes
exercises.description: Opening arms wide with dumbbells while lying down.

exercises.name: Dips (Chest focus)
exercises.description: Leaning forward while doing dips to target pecs.

exercises.name: Cable Crossover
exercises.description: Pulling cables together in front of the chest.

exercises.name: Military Press
exercises.description: Strict overhead press with a barbell.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.description: Lifting dumbbells out to the sides.

exercises.name: Front Raises
exercises.description: Lifting dumbbells straight in front.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.description: Pulling a rope towards your face.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.description: Shoulder press with a rotating motion.

exercises.name: Crunches
exercises.description: Standard abdominal contraction.

exercises.name: Leg Raises
exercises.description: Lifting legs from a lying position.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunches
exercises.description: Alternating knee-to-elbow movement.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raises
exercises.description: Lifting knees while hanging from a bar.

exercises.name: V-Ups
exercises.description: Lifting torso and legs together to form a V.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.description: Pushing a cable bar down to your thighs.

exercises.name: Skull Crushers
exercises.description: Lowering a bar to the forehead and extending.

exercises.name: Diamond Pushups
exercises.description: Pushups with hands close together.

exercises.name: Cable Overhead Extension
exercises.description: Extending cable over head.

exercises.name: Bench Dips
exercises.description: Dips using the edge of a bench.
